## Summary

*One or two sentences on what this PR does.*

## Type of change

- [ ] New chapter (paired with an approved issue)
- [ ] Edit to an existing chapter
- [ ] New entry in an appendix
- [ ] Fix to a typo, link, or formatting
- [ ] Diagram or asset
- [ ] Cross-links update
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## If this is a new chapter

- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) before writing
- [ ] I read the flagship chapter ([trust calibration](../chapters/L4-trust-calibration.md)) and follow its shape
- [ ] I used [`CHAPTER_TEMPLATE.md`](../CHAPTER_TEMPLATE.md)
- [ ] I added an entry to [`cross-links.yaml`](../cross-links.yaml)
- [ ] I included a hero diagram or a placeholder comment for one

## Related issue

*Link to the proposal issue. Required for new chapters; optional for small changes.*
